channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Amb. David Perdue: Trump trip to China was needed to correct decades of American 'malaise'
item.description: President Trump's visit to Beijing was a strategic diplomatic engagement that advanced his top priority of correcting a decades-old economic imbalance...

item.title: When the Guns Fall Silent: Ukraine After the War
item.description: Kyiv, the EU, and the coalition of the willing must prepare for new challenges once the war ends.

item.title: Jürgen Habermas: A Serious Man
item.description: The late German thinker brought liberal secularism to the peak of academic political philosophy.

item.title: Trump weighs Taiwan arms sales as part of negotiations with China, U.S. trade representative says
item.description: U.S. Trade Representative Jamieson Greer said Sunday that President Trump is considering using arms sales to Taiwan as part of broader U.S.-China negotiations.
